untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting absolute point-based rebound thresholds ('any upside movement > 15 points from intraday low') and profit targets based on 'prior range width' — neither can be expressed with allowed indicators without custom lookback logic. Donchian channel used as proxy for 5-day range extremes, but exact 15-point rebound detection and range-width-based profit target are not translatable to standard indicators.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'new low relative to prior 5 days' as close below dc_lower (5-period Donchian). Rebound entry condition approximated as close > low (any upside from intraday low). Stop loss set at 0.5% (~10 points assumed on typical contract). Profit target multiplier set to 1.5x as proxy for 60% of range. Direction set to LONG as signal describes a reversal up after stop penetration. Regime constrained to RANGING as specified.
